use_codes.desc: AS ADJUNCTIVE THERAPY FOR SHORT-TERM ADMINISTRATION (TO TIDE THE PATIENT OVER AN ACUTE EPISODE OR EXACERBATION) IN: ACUTE GOUTY ARTHRITIS
AS ADJUNCTIVE THERAPY FOR SHORT-TERM ADMINISTRATION (TO TIDE THE PATIENT OVER AN ACUTE EPISODE OR EXACERBATION) IN: ANKYLOSING SPONDYLITIS
AS ADJUNCTIVE THERAPY FOR SHORT-TERM ADMINISTRATION (TO TIDE THE PATIENT OVER AN ACUTE EPISODE OR EXACERBATION) IN: JUVENILE RHEUMATOID ARTHRITIS
AS ADJUNCTIVE THERAPY FOR SHORT-TERM ADMINISTRATION (TO TIDE THE PATIENT OVER AN ACUTE EPISODE OR EXACERBATION) IN: PSORIATIC ARTHRITIS
AS ADJUNCTIVE THERAPY FOR SHORT-TERM ADMINISTRATION (TO TIDE THE PATIENT OVER AN ACUTE EPISODE OR EXACERBATION) IN: RHEUMATOID ARTHRITIS
DURING AN EXACERBATION OR AS MAINTENANCE THERAPY IN SELECTED CASES OF: SYSTEMIC DERMATOMYOSITIS (POLYMYOSITIS)
DURING AN EXACERBATION OR AS MAINTENANCE THERAPY IN SELECTED CASES OF: SYSTEMIC LUPUS ERYTHEMATOSUS
SEVERE ACUTE AND CHRONIC ALLERGIC AND INFLAMMATORY PROCESSES INVOLVING THE EYE AND ITS ADNEXA
TO INDUCE A DIURESIS OR A REMISSION OF PROTEINURIA IN THE NEPHROTIC SYNDROME WITHOUT UREMIA OF THE IDIOPATHIC TYPE OR THAT DUE TO LUPUS ERYTHEMATOSUS

indications.text:
Purified Cortrophin Gel is indicated in the following disorders:
1. Rheumatic disorders:
As adjunctive therapy for short-term administration (to tide the patient over an acute
episode or exacerbation) in:
Psoriatic arthritis.
